mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 and other kinases to suppress FLT3-ITD signaling
additional_notes: Strong activity reported in FLT3-ITD AML lines (e.g., MOLM-13, MV4-11)

mechanism: Potent FLT3 inhibitor, including resistant FLT3 mutants
additional_notes: Preclinical activity in MOLM-13/MOLM-14/MV4-11

mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 and related receptor tyrosine kinases
additional_notes: Sensitivity observed in FLT3-ITD AML models

mechanism: Inhibits MET/AXL and FLT3
additional_notes: Active in FLT3-ITD AML models

mechanism: Inhibits Src/ABL/KIT and can inhibit FLT3 signaling
additional_notes: Context-dependent potency; activity seen in FLT3-ITD AML lines

mechanism: Inhibits multiple kinases including FLT3
additional_notes: AML cell growth inhibition reported

mechanism: Inhibits MEK1/2 to suppress FLT3-ITD–driven MAPK signaling
additional_notes: AML preclinical data; MOLM-13 sensitivity reported

mechanism: Inhibits MEK1/2 to block MAPK pathway
additional_notes: AML lines show in vitro sensitivity

mechanism: Inhibits mTORC1 signaling
additional_notes: Pathway inhibition at low–mid nM; viability effects can extend to sub-µM

mechanism: Inhibits XPO1-mediated nuclear export
additional_notes: Broad AML cytotoxicity including MOLM-13

mechanism: Inhibits 26S proteasome catalytic activity
additional_notes: Strong activity in AML lines including MOLM-13

mechanism: Irreversibly inhibits the proteasome (β5 subunit)
additional_notes: AML cell-line activity reported

mechanism: Pan-HDAC inhibition causing epigenetic modulation and apoptosis
additional_notes: Very potent in AML lines, including MOLM-13

mechanism: HDAC inhibition leading to apoptosis/differentiation
additional_notes: Also known as SAHA; active in AML cell lines

mechanism: Inhibits FTase to block RAS and other farnesylated proteins
additional_notes: Historical AML activity, enriched in certain transcriptional subsets

mechanism: Inhibits JAK1/2 signaling
additional_notes: Modest single-agent AML activity; can impact FLT3/JAK crosstalk and combinations

mechanism: Inhibits thioredoxin reductase, inducing ROS and apoptosis
additional_notes: Cytotoxic in FLT3-ITD AML cells including MOLM-13

mechanism: ALDH inhibition; with Cu(II) forms a proteotoxic/ROS-inducing complex
additional_notes: Requires copper cofactor for potent activity; weaker without copper

mechanism: Modulates STAT3/Wnt and mitochondrial function
additional_notes: AML cell-line cytotoxicity reported

mechanism: Disrupts microtubules leading to mitotic arrest
additional_notes: Anthelmintic with in vitro anti-leukemic activity
